cases.prompt: /domain-glossary 우리 코스 비디오 매니저 프로젝트에 CONTEXT.md 만들어줘. 주요 개념은 Course, Section, Lesson, Materialization.

assertions.text: The agent creates CONTEXT.md at the project root.
The file follows the format: project name + one-line, Language section with one-paragraph definitions, Relationships section, Flagged ambiguities section.
Definitions describe what terms mean in the domain, not how they are stored or coded (no SQL, no file paths, no function signatures).
Each term has an '_Avoid_' line listing synonyms or older names.

cases.prompt: /grill-me 도중에 '취소'가 부분 환불인지 전체 취소인지 애매하다는 게 드러났어. CONTEXT.md 업데이트해줘.

assertions.text: The agent updates CONTEXT.md in the same turn, not batched.
If '취소' was ambiguous, the agent splits it into two precise terms (e.g., Refund vs Cancellation) and adds both to the Language section.
The Flagged ambiguities section gets an entry showing '취소' was resolved into the two new terms.

cases.prompt: /domain-glossary CONTEXT.md 에 Stripe API 엔드포인트랑 결제 플로우 다이어그램도 넣어줘

assertions.text: The agent refuses to add API endpoints or flow diagrams to CONTEXT.md.
The agent suggests the right destination: API endpoints to code/docs, flow diagrams to docs/adr/ or a separate design doc.
The agent explains that CONTEXT.md is a pure glossary and mixing in specs defeats its purpose (reducing verbosity).
